_comment: ElementMoveTool combined T → R → S chain (Stage 14.5). Picked centre on the +X+Y+Z corner, radius 0.5; falloff weight = 1 at the corner and 0 elsewhere. TX=0.3 + SX=2.0 in one apply. Pivot captured ONCE before the translate (ACEN.Element recomputes on every query, so without snapshotting the pivot would drift mid-apply). Per-vert weights ALSO snapshotted at the baseline positions — matches MODO's xfrm.transform single-weight semantic. Corner with baseline-weight 1: TX gives (0.5+0.3, 0.5, 0.5); then SX=2 around pivot (0,0,0) with the SAME weight 1 gives x = 0 + 0.8 · 2.0 = 1.6.
